purpose: Top funnel attention + immediate action — CF-P1 Squeeze Page
rules: Primary CTA above fold on all devices
Max 2 CTAs in hero — Order Now (primary) + Reserve Pickup (secondary)
No external navigation — remove escape routes
Location tag visible: USA shipping + Orangevale pickup

tailwind_structure.badge: inline-flex px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-sm bg-amber-100 text-amber-800
tailwind_structure.headline: text-4xl sm:text-5xl font-bold text-amber-900
tailwind_structure.cta_primary: bg-amber-700 hover:bg-amber-800 text-white px-6 py-3 rounded-2xl font-semibold
tailwind_structure.cta_secondary: border border-slate-300 bg-white px-6 py-3 rounded-2xl font-semibold
